# Kumuluz — Full machine-readable brief

Kumuluz is an enterprise platform family developed and delivered by Sunesis. It
helps organizations build governed platforms where AI agents, APIs, business
capabilities, workflows, digital services and data work together.

This file is a curated, machine-readable product brief — not a copy of the full
site. For canonical pages see https://kumuluz.com/sitemap.xml.

## Kumuluz in brief

- Enterprise platform family developed and delivered by Sunesis.
- Main products: KumuluzAI Platform, Kumuluz API, Kumuluz Business APIs, Kumuluz Digital Platform and Kumuluz Crowdsensing.
- Main solution areas: AgenticAI platforms, enterprise AI assistants, AI knowledge management, API management, cloud-native digital platforms, Business APIs and smart communities.
- Designed for enterprise environments where governance, security, integration, auditability and production readiness matter.
- Helps organizations connect AI agents, APIs, business capabilities, workflows, digital services and data.

## Homepage

URL: https://kumuluz.com/en/
Enterprise platforms for AgenticAI, APIs and digital services. Kumuluz helps
organizations build governed AgenticAI platforms, API ecosystems, reusable
Business APIs, cloud-native digital services and AI-enhanced data solutions.

## Products

### KumuluzAI Platform
URL: https://kumuluz.com/en/products/kumuluz-ai/
Enterprise AgenticAI platform for building secure, governed and production-ready
AI agents, assistants, RAG solutions and AI-powered business automation. Runs and
governs agents, tools, model routing, approvals, auditability and cost visibility.

### Kumuluz API
URL: https://kumuluz.com/en/products/kumuluz-api/
API management platform that exposes, manages, secures and monitors APIs across
teams, partners, digital ecosystems and AI agents. Provides API cataloging,
developer portals, gateway management, access control, MCP-oriented API exposure,
contextual routing, LLM routing and token usage logging.

### Kumuluz Business APIs
URL: https://kumuluz.com/en/products/business-apis/
Reusable, AgenticAI-ready and workflow-ready business capabilities exposed as
agent-callable APIs for products, AI agents and workflows.

### Kumuluz Digital Platform
URL: https://kumuluz.com/en/products/digital-platform/
Cloud-native foundation for building digital services, APIs, connectors,
MCP-enabled tools and deterministic workflows that applications and AI agents use.

### Kumuluz Crowdsensing
URL: https://kumuluz.com/en/products/crowdsensing/
Collects and processes distributed real-world data using privacy-aware
processing, analytics and AI-enhanced insight generation for smart services and
smart communities.

## Solutions

Overview: https://kumuluz.com/en/solutions/

- Agentic AI Platforms — https://kumuluz.com/en/solutions/agentic-ai-platforms/
  Governed enterprise platforms where AI agents safely use enterprise knowledge,
  APIs, tools, workflows and business systems.
- Enterprise AI Assistants — https://kumuluz.com/en/solutions/enterprise-ai-assistants/
  AI assistants for customers and employees without creating isolated AI silos.
- AI Knowledge Management — https://kumuluz.com/en/solutions/ai-knowledge-management/
  Make enterprise knowledge accessible through governed, source-aware AI and RAG.
- API Management & API Economy — https://kumuluz.com/en/solutions/api-management/
  Turn APIs into governed digital assets for teams, partners and AI agents.
- Cloud-native Digital Platforms — https://kumuluz.com/en/solutions/cloud-native-digital-platforms/
  Cloud-native platforms that support applications, workflows and AI agents.
- Business APIs — https://kumuluz.com/en/solutions/business-apis/
  Reusable business capabilities for digital products, AI agents and workflows.
- Crowdsensing & Smart Communities — https://kumuluz.com/en/solutions/crowdsensing-smart-communities/
  Distributed data and AI analytics for smart community services.

## Why Kumuluz

URL: https://kumuluz.com/en/about/
Kumuluz is designed for organizations that need secure, governed,
integration-ready and production-ready platform foundations for enterprise AI,
APIs, workflows, digital services and data-driven smart services.

## Delivered by Sunesis

Kumuluz is developed and delivered by Sunesis, a Slovenian enterprise software
engineering and technology company. https://sunesis.si/en/

## Contact

Request a demo or contact the Kumuluz team: https://kumuluz.com/en/#contact
